zh.lifeSummary: 當Wilhelm III. von Jülich-Hengebach於大約1187年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次爾利時，他的父親Eberhard II. von Hengebach34歲，母親Jutta von Jülich32歲。他於大約1215年與Mathilde van Limburg結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1218年在埃及دمياط享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Wilhelm III. von Jülich-Hengebach于大约1187年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次爾利时，他的父亲Eberhard II. von Hengebach34岁，母亲Jutta von Jülich32岁。他于大约1215年与Mathilde van Limburg结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1218年在埃及دمياط享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Wilhelm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from wil ‘will’ + helm ‘helmet’; an ancient royal name. See also William .

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: III.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Wilhelm III. von Jülich-Hengebach was born about 1187, in Jülich, Rhineland, Prussia, his father, Eberhard II. von Hengebach, was 34 and his mother, Jutta von Jülich, was 32. He married Mathilde van Limburg about 1215. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1218, in Damietta, Egypt, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wilhelm III. von Jülich-Hengebach est né environ 1187, à Jülich, Rhénanie, Prusse, son père, Eberhard II. von Hengebach, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Jutta von Jülich, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde van Limburg environ 1215. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1218, à Damietta, Égypte, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wilhelm III. von Jülich-Hengebach um 1187 in Jülich, Rheinprovinz, Preußen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eberhard II. von Hengebach 34 und seine Mutter Jutta von Jülich 32. Er hat um 1215 Mathilde van Limburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1218 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Damietta, Ägypten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Wilhelm III. von Jülich-Hengebach è nato il circa 1187 nel Jülich, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, il suo padre, Eberhard II. von Hengebach, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Jutta von Jülich, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde van Limburg circa 1215. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1218, nel Damietta, Egitto, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Wilhelm III. von Jülich-Hengebachが約1187年にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズジuリチで生まれた時，父Eberhard II. von Hengebachは34歳，母Jutta von Jülichは32歳であった。約1215年にMathilde van Limburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1218年にエジプトدمياطで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Wilhelm III. von Jülich-Hengebach(이)가 대략 1187년 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 제이u리치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eberhard II. von Hengebach(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Jutta von Jülich(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1215년 Mathilde van Limburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1218년 이집트 دمياط에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wilhelm III. von Jülich-Hengebach nasceu aproximadamente 1187, em Jülich, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, seu pai, Eberhard II. von Hengebach, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Jutta von Jülich, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde van Limburg aproximadamente 1215. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1218, em Damietta, Egipto, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wilhelm III. von Jülich-Hengebach родился около 1187 г. в местности джuлич, раинпровинз, Пруссия, его отцу по имени Eberhard II. von Hengebach было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Jutta von Jülich, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde van Limburg около 1215 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1218 г. в местности دمياط, Египет в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Wilhelm III. von Jülich-Hengebach nació aproximadamente 1187, en Jülich, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, su papá, Eberhard II. von Hengebach, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Jutta von Jülich, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Mathilde van Limburg aproximadamente 1215. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1218, en Damietta, Egipto, a la edad de 32 años.
